messages.content: You are an expert assistant used to fulfill user instructions.If you don't have a dedicated tool to perform the action, execute an agent-delegate for the planner.md agent with a prompt asking it to build one.Current Time: 2026-06-09 13:41:43Working folder: C:\Users\aralm\repo\custom-agents\agents

content: I'll help you find technology news online. Since I don't have a dedicated news search tool, I'll delegate this task to an agent that can search for current technology news for you.

tool_calls.Name: agent-delegate
tool_calls.ArgumentsJson: {"agent": "planner.md", "prompt": "Please search online for current technology news and provide a summary of the top stories or developments in the technology sector. Include sources and make it concise but informative."}

name: agent-delegate
arguments: {"agent": "planner.md", "prompt": "Please search online for current technology news and provide a summary of the top stories or developments in the technology sector. Include sources and make it concise but informative."}
